title: Better Unpackables
description: Adds some quality-of-life unpacking recipes to the game.
body:
<center>
  
![image](https://i.postimg.cc/rmkdNyg6/BU_Final_Header.png)

A Minecraft data pack and mod that adds some quality-of-life unpacking recipes to the game.

*Want some better crafting recipes? Check out [Better Craftables](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-craftables)!*

</center>

## Overview

Better Unpackables, available as a data pack and a Fabric, Quilt, Forge & NeoForge mod, enhances the vanilla Minecraft experience with new recipes such as:

* Amethyst Block -> Amethyst Shards
* Wool -> String
* Quartz Block -> Nether Quartz
* Packed Ice -> Ice
* Smooth Sandstone -> Sandstone

Visit the [Gallery page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-unpackables/gallery) for a brief look at what Better Unpackables has to offer or check out the [Unpacking Recipes](https://github.com/Classics-Craftworks/Better-Unpackables/wiki/Unpacking-Recipes) page on the wiki for a full list!

## Versions

| Minecraft Version | Data Pack Version | Mod Version
| :--: | :--: | :--: |
| 26.1 - 26.2 | [v4.1.0](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-unpackables/version/v4.1.0) | [v4.1.0+mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-unpackables/version/v4.1.0+mod) |
| 1.21.9 - 1.21.11 | [v3.2.0](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-unpackables/version/v3.2.0) | [v3.2.0+mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-unpackables/version/v3.2.0+mod) |

Older versions and snapshots can be found [here on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-unpackables/versions) or [on GitHub](https://github.com/Classics-Craftworks/Better-Unpackables/wiki/Versions).

Make sure you download the correct version that matches your Minecraft version and mod loader if you are using Fabric or Forge. Please note that **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required to run the Fabric/Quilt mod version** of Better Unpackables.

## Support & Feedback
Found a bug or have an idea?
* Open a [GitHub issue](https://github.com/Classics-Craftworks/Better-Unpackables/issues/new/choose)
* Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/vZJSDjPcmu)
